description_long: This apartment building consists of a row of identical, multi-story structures with flat roofs and a modern, rectangular design. The facades feature a regular grid of windows, with some sections highlighted by orange or red balcony railings, adding visual interest and rhythm. The buildings are primarily white and beige, with black sections likely representing shadowed or recessed areas. The front and rear elevations are characterized by large, evenly spaced windows, while the sides are more solid with fewer openings. The overall appearance suggests a contemporary residential complex, possibly designed for urban neighborhoods. The buildings are closely grouped, indicating a high-density living arrangement typical of city apartment blocks.
description: A row of modern, multi-story apartment buildings with flat roofs, white and beige facades, and prominent window grids accented by orange balcony railings.
description_view_0: This view shows the side and partial front of the apartment buildings, highlighting the white and beige facades with some visible windows and balconies.
description_view_1: The front view displays the full facade of the buildings, emphasizing the symmetrical arrangement of windows and the orange balcony railings.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, this angle shows the opposite side and partial front, with the same color scheme and window patterns visible.
description_view_3: This view is identical to view 1, showing the front of the buildings with clear window and balcony arrangements.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are arranged in a symmetrical, grid-like pattern across the facade, with consistent spacing and alignment on each floor. Balconies are integrated into the window grid, providing regular interruptions to the pattern.
